video_prompt: style: Cinematic Realism v1, mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting, color palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. cinematic live-action video shot. scene: Apartment Kitchen Night. red fridge, wooden table, rainy window. lighting: dim warm lamp + blue moonlight. character (charA_v1): short_black, white_hoodie + black_jeans, silver_ring_left_hand. 林澈的手机屏幕亮起, 特写屏幕显示一行字：别喝, 林澈惊恐地看向手机. Narration: "手机忽然亮起，屏幕上只有一行字：别喝。". 林澈 says: "这是谁发的？". Camera motion: extreme close-up, ultra shallow depth of field, slow micro-movement. Extreme close-up of smartphone screen in dim kitchen, text '别喝' displayed, reflection of young man's face in screen, blue light on face, tense expression, shallow depth of field, high contrast. Shot-to-shot continuity: maintain identical character identity, scene layout, lighting and prop positions as established in previous shot. Visual style must match preceding frame. Do not introduce new visual elements not present in the reference images. Character identity locked to reference images. No face morphing or outfit variation.. Scene layout locked to context reference frame. Do not reposition props or alter lighting source.. Camera transition smooth from previous shot continuity frame. No abrupt jump cut between shots. Stable visual consistency across entire clip. No character drift, no prop mutation, no scene layout shift.

workflow.tool_instructions: Use video prompt + context keyframes for img2vid conditioning. Copy 'video_prompt' into your video tool. Use 'available' context_refs images as start-frame conditioning for shot-to-shot visual continuity.
